title: Competitor Gap Brief
description: The sector-level research artifact that converts outreach from a vendor pitch into a research finding. Generated after the hiring signal brief. Every peer-company claim in the agent's outreach must map to a competitor entry in this brief with a public source URL.

prospect_domain.description: Must match the domain in the corresponding hiring_signal_brief.json.

prospect_sector.description: Sector classification used to define peer group. Use the Crunchbase 'categories' field as the default, narrowed to a sub-niche where useful.

prospect_sub_niche.description: Optional finer-grained niche, e.g. 'AdTech SSP' rather than 'advertising technology'.

sector_top_quartile_benchmark.description: Average AI maturity score of the top-quartile peer companies analyzed.

competitors_analyzed.description: Five to ten peer companies scored on the same AI maturity rubric.

ai_maturity_justification.description: One line per signal input that contributed to the score.

top_quartile.description: True if this competitor is in the top quartile of AI maturity within the sector.

gap_findings.description: Two to three specific practices the top quartile shows public signal for that the prospect does not. Quality is graded on specificity — 'they use AI' is useless; 'three peers have opened named MLOps-platform-engineer roles in the last 60 days' is valuable.

practice.description: The specific practice. Must be phrased as a verifiable fact, not an opinion.

prospect_state.description: What the prospect's public signal shows (or does not show) on this practice. Must be specific — 'no public signal of X' is acceptable, 'the prospect does not do X' without evidence is not.

confidence.description: Confidence in the gap finding. Low confidence forces the agent's phrasing to 'ask' rather than 'assert'.

segment_relevance.description: Which ICP segments this gap finding is most relevant to.

suggested_pitch_shift.description: Brief prompt-engineering note for the outreach composer — e.g. 'Shift from generic talent pitch to specialized capability gap: stand up your first MLOps function with a dedicated squad.' Used as a soft guide, not a hard constraint.

gap_quality_self_check.description: The brief's honest assessment of its own reliability. The agent must respect these flags when composing outreach.

prospect_silent_but_sophisticated_risk.description: True if the prospect shows some signal of internal sophistication (e.g., recent technical blog posts) despite low public AI-maturity signal. Indicates a false-negative risk and softens gap language.
